crosspatch.config.crosspatch.comment.pic: Enable CrossPatch's pickBlockPro feature. When disabled, vanilla pick block behaviour is left untouched.
Maximum distance (in blocks) at which pick block can target a block while pickBlockPro is enabled. Vanilla pick block is limited to 4 blocks; this override extends that reach.
When enabled, picking while looking at a player gives that player's current player head (with their skin). Works at normal reach; combine with pickBlockPro to pick distant players too.

When enabled in survival, if the picked item is not loose in your inventory but a shulker box you carry contains a matching item, that shulker box is picked to your hand instead (only the box is taken; its contents are left untouched). In creative the item itself is picked as usual.
crosspatch.config.generic.comment.layerC: How many layers a single Layer Next / Layer Previous press moves. Applies to both Litematica's own layer hotkeys and CrossPatch Box Layer. 1 = normal single-step; higher values treat one press as that many presses.
crosspatch.config.tweakermore.comment.au: When TweakerMore's "auto collect material list item" feature runs, collect each material rounded up to the next full stack instead of the exact missing amount. Example: 14 missing with a stack size of 64 collects 64; with a stack size of 16 collects 16.

When TweakerMore's "auto collect material list item" feature runs, also pull whole shulker boxes (any color) from the container whose contents match a missing material. The box is moved into your inventory and Litematica credits its contents against the material list.
Only collect a shulker box when it is filled with a single item type that matches the needed material. When disabled, any shulker box that contains the needed item is collected.
crosspatch.gui.warning.invalid_range: Invalid range: no schematic blocks will be rendered.
crosspatch.gui.hover.enable: Use this bound as a schematic render limit.
crosspatch.gui.hover.hotkey: Move this bound with layer hotkeys.
crosspatch.gui.hover.force_litematica_al: Keeps Litematica's own render layer mode set to All while using CrossPatch Box Layer.
crosspatch.gui.hover.box_layer: Enable CrossPatch Box Layer rendering filter.
